sections.paragraph:
Original: כּספיא

Transliteration: kâsiphyâ'

Phonetic: kaw-sif-yaw'

BDB Definition:

Casiphia = "silvery"
  1. a place in Babylonia on the road between Babylon and Jerusalem; site uncertain

Origin: perhaps from H3701

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
